sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच। इदं तु ते गुह्यतमं प्रवक्ष्याम्यनसूयवे। ज्ञानं विज्ञानसहितं यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽशुभात्॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca / idaṃ tu te guhyatamaṃ pravakṣyāmy-anasūyave / jñānaṃ vijñāna-sahitaṃ yaj-jñātvā mokṣyase ’śubhāt
literal_meaning: The Lord said: 'To you, who are non-envious, I shall now speak this most secret knowledge together with direct realization; knowing which you will be freed from the inauspicious.'
contextual_meaning: Krishna signals a therapeutic alliance: only a mind free of envy can receive the deepest insight that dissolves existential distress.
psychological_state: Pre-contemplation turning to readiness; client (Arjuna) has earned secure base with therapist (Krishna) and is about to receive the 'core schema' intervention.
trigger_scenario: A therapist saying, 'Because you’ve stopped blaming others, I can share the insight that will finally lift your depression.'
anchor_text: A quiet mind hears the truth that ends all sorrow.
